description_long: This bungalow features a low, sprawling profile with a complex roofline composed of intersecting gable and hip sections, covered in textured gray shingles. The exterior walls are predominantly dark, with contrasting white and black horizontal striping that creates a striking visual pattern. Large windows are visible on several sides, including a set of grouped windows on one facade and a garage door with multiple panels. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a patterned ground surface, alternating between green and black or white stripes, suggesting landscaped lawns and paved areas. The main entrance is marked by a small overhang, and there is a visible chimney on one section of the roof. The overall design is modern with geometric landscaping and a focus on bold, graphic contrasts.
description: A modern bungalow with a complex gabled roof, bold striped exterior walls, large windows, and geometric landscaping on a rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main roof sections, the main entrance, and a mix of striped and green landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, garage door, and the extensive striped ground pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with grouped windows, a visible chimney, and a clear view of the geometric lawn and roof intersections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, more of the striped landscaping, and the side profile of the roof.
